# Logobase — crypto logo library for AI coding agents

Logobase serves up-to-date logos for crypto tokens, DeFi protocols, networks,
and wallets (1,200+ icons). Use a logo by URL (no install, no API key), or query
the JSON API to discover assets. All logos are square transparent PNGs.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## 1. Logo image URLs  (primary — drop straight into <img> / CSS)

Pattern:
  https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/{namespace}/{id}/{size}.png

- size is one of: 32 | 64 | 128 | 256
- Logos are immutable and CDN-cached — safe to hotlink directly.

By category:

  Token (ERC-20, SPL, etc.) — {chain}/{contractAddress}, EVM addresses LOWERCASED:
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/ethereum/0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48/64.png   # USDC

  Native L1 coin — {chain}/native:
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/bitcoin/native/64.png     # BTC
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/ethereum/native/64.png    # ETH
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/dogecoin/native/64.png    # DOGE

  DeFi protocol — protocol/{slug}:
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/protocol/lido/64.png
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/protocol/aave-v3/64.png

  Network / chain — network/{slug}:
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/network/base/64.png
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/network/arbitrum/64.png

  Wallet — wallet/{slug}:
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/wallet/metamask/64.png
    https://cdn.defitriangle.xyz/logos/wallet/phantom/64.png

Token chains currently covered: ethereum, smartchain (BNB Smart Chain), polygon,
solana, bitcoin, dogecoin.

### Shape variants (rounded / semi-rounded badges)

Any logo can be served as a shaped badge, generated on demand:

  https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/icon/{chain}/{address}?shape={rounded|semi-rounded}&size={16..512}

  rounded      = full circle
  semi-rounded = rounded-corner square (squircle)

  https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/icon/bitcoin/native?shape=rounded&size=128
  https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/icon/ethereum/0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48?shape=semi-rounded&size=64

These work for every asset (a curated override is used when present, otherwise
the badge is auto-generated from the base logo).

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## 2. Discover assets — JSON API

Base: https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/v1   (CORS-open, rate-limited, no key)

  GET /assets?kind=&chain=&symbol=&verified=&limit=&offset=
  GET /assets/{chain}/{address}
  GET /search?q=<text>          # matches symbol / name / address / chain
  GET /recent

  kind is one of: token | protocol | network | wallet   (filter the catalog)

Each asset is:
  {
    "id": "ethereum:native",
    "kind": "token",
    "chain": "ethereum",
    "address": "native",
    "symbol": "ETH",
    "name": "Ethereum",
    "rank": 2,
    "verified": true,
    "logo": { "png256": "...", "png128": "...", "png64": "...", "png32": "...", "svg": null }
  }

Examples:
  https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/v1/search?q=usdc
  https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/v1/assets?kind=wallet&limit=50
  https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/v1/assets?kind=protocol&limit=50
  https://icons.hirahul.xyz/api/v1/assets/ethereum/native

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## 3. Recommended flow for an agent

  1. Resolve the asset:  GET /api/v1/search?q=<symbol or name>
     -> read its `chain` + `address` (and the ready-made `logo` URLs).
  2. Render `logo.png64` (or build the CDN URL from the pattern above).
  Do NOT guess contract addresses — resolve them via the API first.

React helper (optional, if the npm package is installed):
  import { getLogoUrl } from "@hirahul/crypto-logos";
  const src = getLogoUrl({ chain: "dogecoin", address: "native", size: 64 });
  // or: import { TokenIcon } from "@hirahul/crypto-logos/react";

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Notes

- EVM contract addresses are lowercased in URLs; Solana mints keep their case.
- A missing logo returns HTTP 404 — render a placeholder fallback.
- Free to use. Logos are the property of their respective projects/brands.
- Explore the full library at https://icons.hirahul.xyz
